tool.description:
Enumerate top-level window titles on Windows and return structured JSON. Parameters: 'all' (include non-visible), 'pid' (include PID), 'class' (include window class name).system_prompttool.system_promptThis tool enumerates top-level window titles on Windows and returns structured JSON. It is Windows-only.parameterstypeobjectpropertiesalltypebooleandescriptionparam.all.descriptionInclude non-visible windowspidtypebooleandescriptionparam.pid.descriptionInclude PID in outputclasstypebooleandescriptionparam.class.descriptionInclude window class name in outputrequiredList top-level windows on Windows.

    args:
      - all: bool (include non-visible windows)
      - pid: bool (include PID)
      - class: bool (include window class name)

    Returns JSON string:
      {: [{: int, : str, : bool, : str (opt), : int (opt)}], : int}
    win32errorThis tool runs on Windows (win32) only.all
